lines.english: Without her calf, the cow is lonely. ||1||
I am restless and unhappy.
Without water, the fish writhes in pain.
Gond:

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੇ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਬਾਪੁਰੋ ਨਾਮਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aise raam naamaa bin baapuro naamaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: So is poor Naam Dayv without the Lord's Name. ||1||Pause||
Like the cow's calf, which, when let loose,
Meeting the Guru, I have seen the Unseen Lord. ||3||
sucks at her udders and drinks her milk -||2||
So has Naam Dayv found the Lord.
so does Naam Dayv love the Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੈਸੇ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਬਾਪੁਰੋ ਨਾਮਾ ॥੫॥੪॥
lines.translit: taise raam naamaa bin baapuro naamaa |5|4|
lines.english: so does poor Naam Dayv burn without the Lord's Name. ||5||4||
As the man driven by sex wants another man's wife,
As the earth burns in the dazzling sunlight,
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗੋਂਡ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਾਮਦੇਉ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: raag gondd baanee naamadeo jeeo kee ghar 2 |
lines.english: Raag Gond, The Word Of Naam Dayv Jee, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਤ ਜਾਤਿ ਕੁਲ ਹਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: har har karat jaat kul haree |
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, erases social classes and ancestral pedigrees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਲੈ ਊਤਮ ਧਰਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: har ko naam lai aootam dharamaa |
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord is the highest religion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਤ ਮਿਟੇ ਸਭਿ ਭਰਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: har har karat mitte sabh bharamaa |
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, all doubts are dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਤ ਨਹੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਮਹ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har karat nahee dukh jamah |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, you will not be tormented by the Messenger of Death. ||1||Pause||
I bow to the Lord, I humbly bow to the Lord.
The Lord is the walking stick of the blind. ||1||
Teaching a parrot to speak the Lord's Name, Ganika the prostitute was saved.
The Lord took the life of Harnaakhash,
and gave Ajaamal a place in heaven.
That Lord is the light of my eyes. ||2||
even though she was a deceitful child-killer.
Chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, Pootna was saved,
The Lord, who killed Kaysee and Kans,
Contemplating the Lord, Dropadi was saved.
Gautam's wife, turned to stone, was saved. ||3||
meditating on Him, fear and suffering are dispelled. ||4||1||5||
gave the gift of life to Kali.
Prays Naam Dayv, such is my Lord;
I take only the Name of the One Lord.
Gond:
is riding on a donkey, kicking up the dust. ||1||
One who chases after the god Bhairau, evil spirits and the goddess of smallpox,
is riding on a bull, shaking a tambourine. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਵ ਸਿਵ ਕਰਤੇ ਜੋ ਨਰੁ ਧਿਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: siv siv karate jo nar dhiaavai |
lines.english: That man who chants "Shiva, Shiva", and meditates on him,
I have given away all other gods in exchange for Him. ||1||Pause||
will be reincarnated as a woman, and not a man. ||3||
One who worships the Great Goddess Maya
You are called the Primal Goddess.
Follow the Guru's Teachings, and hold tight to the Lord's Name, O friend.
At the time of liberation, where will you hide then? ||4||
Bilaaval Gond:
Thus prays Naam Dayv, and so says the Gita as well. ||5||2||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਜੁ ਨਾਮੇ ਬੀਠਲੁ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਮੂਰਖ ਕੋ ਸਮਝਾਊ ਰੇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aaj naame beetthal dekhiaa moorakh ko samajhaaoo re | rahaau |
lines.english: Today, Naam Dayv saw the Lord, and so I will instruct the ignorant. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੈ ਕਰਿ ਠੇਗਾ ਟਗਰੀ ਤੋਰੀ ਲਾਂਗਤ ਲਾਂਗਤ ਜਾਤੀ ਥੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: lai kar tthegaa ttagaree toree laangat laangat jaatee thee |1|
lines.english: Taking a stick, the farmer broke its leg, and now it walks with a limp. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਂਡੇ ਤੁਮਰੀ ਗਾਇਤ੍ਰੀ ਲੋਧੇ ਕਾ ਖੇਤੁ ਖਾਤੀ ਥੀ ॥
lines.translit: paandde tumaree gaaeitree lodhe kaa khet khaatee thee |
lines.english: O Pandit, O religious scholar, your Gayatri was grazing in the fields.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਦੀ ਕੇ ਘਰ ਖਾਣਾ ਪਾਕਾ ਵਾ ਕਾ ਲੜਕਾ ਮਾਰਿਆ ਥਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: modee ke ghar khaanaa paakaa vaa kaa larrakaa maariaa thaa |2|
lines.english: In the merchant's house, a banquet was prepared for him - he killed the merchant's son. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਂਡੇ ਤੁਮਰਾ ਮਹਾਦੇਉ ਧਉਲੇ ਬਲਦ ਚੜਿਆ ਆਵਤੁ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: paandde tumaraa mahaadeo dhaule balad charriaa aavat dekhiaa thaa |
lines.english: O Pandit, I saw your great god Shiva, riding along on a white bull.
